title: TUI layout improvements shared execution root
description: Shared feature container for the TUI dashboard updates covering default filter behavior, detail popup interaction, dual-layout switching, and the required shared follow-up validation, documentation, and review work.
acceptance_criteria: The feature tree covers default filter changes, Enter-driven detail popup behavior, merge binding removal, compact/wide layout toggling, and shared follow-up beads for testing, documentation, and review.
All concrete implementation work is delegated to focused child beads with explicit dependencies.
Exactly one shared tester bead, one shared documentation bead, and one shared review bead exist as children of this feature bead.
